allResults.name: Quatromatic
allResults.description: Quatromatic Ltd develops AI-driven machine vision systems for inline quality control and production monitoring in conveyor-type building materials production. The company focuses on defect detection, dimensional control, and color and density monitoring for paving slabs, concrete blocks, clay bricks, and hermetic tiles. Its systems generate real-time production statistics, shift reports, and digital archives to support data-driven process optimization. Quatromatic serves manufacturers seeking to automate inspection, reduce scrap, and improve raw material usage without major changes to existing production lines. || Quatromatic Ltd develops AI and machine vision systems for inline production monitoring in building materials manufacturing. | Quatromatic Ltd develops AI-driven machine vision systems for inline quality control and production monitoring in conveyor-type building materials production. The company focuses on defect detection, dimensional control, and color and density monitoring for paving slabs, concrete blocks, clay bricks, and hermetic tiles. Its systems generate real-time production statistics, shift reports, and digital archives to support data-driven process optimization. Quatromatic serves manufacturers seeking to automate inspection, reduce scrap, and improve raw material usage without major changes to existing production lines. | Quatromatic is a team of developers and integrators of automatic quality control systems, which helps to control production processes of concrete blocks and paving slabs. We combines competencies in the field of neural networks and computer vision, as well as competencies in the production of building materials. A deep understanding of modern information technologies and production needs allows us to develop and implement products that are in demand in such industries as the production of small-piece concrete products, reinforced concrete products, aerated concrete blocks, bricks, and sheet materials. QuatroPBC is based on machine vision and artificial Intelligence technologies, which helps to identify problems with products in real time and take action to prevent manufacturing of defective products. Focused on the pavement industry. QuatroPBC main features: 1. measures the height of concrete products; 2. detects the upper surface defects and show data in operator interface; 3. keeps and analyzes the data; 4. works on a wet side - this is more effective for the concrete industry. To learn more about Quatromatic, visit www.quatromatic.com feel free to ask any quaestion, we glad to answer!
allResults.rationale: Develops AI-driven machine vision systems for inline quality control with clear delivery ownership.

allResults.name: Mina Bästa Polare

Mina Bästa Polares is a Sweden-based solutions provider specializing in custom software development, API integration, and AI-powered workflow automation. We build tailored platforms and intelligent applications for clients in pharmaceutical, professional services, and manufacturing industries — helping organizations streamline operations, automate business processes, and connect disparate systems. From custom client portals and AI automation to system integration and phased digital transformation, we deliver practical, high-impact solutions designed around each client's specific operational needs. We build tailored platforms and intelligent applications for clients in pharmaceutical, professional services, and manufacturing industries — helping organizations streamline operations, automate business processes, and connect disparate systems. From custom client portals and AI automation to system integration and phased digital transformation, we deliver practical, high-impact solutions designed around each client's specific operational needs. Custom Software Development Bespoke Platform Development API Integration System Integration Third-party Integration AI Application Development AI-powered Workflow Automation Business Process Automation Agentic AI Solutions Conversational AI / AI Chatbots Customer Portal Development Self-service Portal Client-facing Web Applications B2B SaaS Development | Since 2010, we have been designing and developing innovative digital solutions for both startups and global giants. We help you challenge old conventions and develop digital tools and services that elevate your business. Always with a focus on business benefits and amazing user experiences. We genuinely care about you and your users, all the way from idea to success. That's what best friends are for. We work with: Service Design & Innovation: We help you develop new innovative and user-friendly services, or improve your existing ones. By understanding users' needs, behaviors, and motivations, we can design digital experiences that truly elevate your business. From proof of concepts and design prototypes to a first working MVP. Web and System Development: We develop customized and user-friendly digital platforms, websites, systems, and applications. From idea to finished solution, entirely based on your specific needs. Do you have an idea for a completely new service or product? Or do you want to improve what you already have? Get in touch, and let's meet over a cup of coffee." | Mina Bästa Polare - My Best Buddies - is a digital agency in the north of Sweden, where even global brands can feel at home. We specialise in smart and elegant digital solutions. We believe in overall quality, in motivated individuals and long-term friendship.

We are a small, flexible and rapid team of people with our feet on the ground and our gaze over the horizon. We are convinced that group intelligence is vastly superior to that of the individual. Smart and elegant solutions arise when people who work together are open, honest and share their expertise and their ideas. That’s when it’s possible to work in a way that is smarter, faster and more effective.

Wee build web platforms often with vast integrations that supports great user experiences. It goes without saying that everything is optimised for search engines and everything is measurable. 

Sometimes we will also work as a subcontractor to agencies who lack our programming expertise.

In brief, there are some things that Mina Bästa Polare takes pride in:
● We say what we think and we mean what we say.
● We don’t give advice that we wouldn’t follow.
● We live for committed brands and get results.
● We stand firm when others give up, but we never stand still.
● We don’t read minds but we are good at listening (to both you and your customers).
● We gladly toss away accepted truths and demolish conventions.
● We aren’t young enough to know everything.
● We don’t let good get in the way of fantastic.
● We always keep the door open and never hesitate to take on a challenge.

Tell us about your idea or problem and the results you want to achieve.
If you’re in the neighbourhood, drop in for a coffee and we’ll get ready to work.

With 3 decades and 140 employees -where 7 out of every 10 are engineers and tech specialists- we control the whole cycle through vertical integration to ensure optimal results, from the gathering of requirements, the design and development of the solution, the manufacturing and assembly, up to the programming, integration, and deployment. We have specialization and proven experience in processes, covering mechanics, electro-mechanics, industrial control, manufacturing systems, electronic and testing systems, machine vision, robotics, and Smart Factory systems that enable intelligence, flexibility, and machine reuse for an optimal application of resources, and the best efficiency in our customers’ processes. allResults.name: BotCraft
allResults.description:
BotCraft develops software for Industry 4.0, focusing on industrial IoT, connectivity, and robotics. The company offers configurable software bots that link OT and IT, connect machines and sensors to cloud platforms, and enable data-driven services such as predictive maintenance and quality. Its products include IIoT connectors, workflow automation and RPA tools, and AI-based analytics components that run on edge, fog, or server environments. BotCraft also provides consulting and development services in embedded systems, IoT, robotics, and DevSecOps to help customers extend products, digitize production, and automate processes. || BotCraft ist ein spezialisierter Dienstleister für Konnektivitätslösungen an Maschinen, Bauteilen oder Produkten. Diese Lösungen bilden den Unterbau an Schnittstellen für AIoT, iRPA oder Industrie 4.0 Systeme. Basierend auf seinem IIoT-Framework entwickelt BotCraft sichere und intelligente Robotic-Process-Automation Software für Industrieprozesse (iRPA) sowie AIoT Lösungen, die die Leistungsfähigkeit einer Prozessautomatisierung durch Advanced Robotics noch weiter verbessern.

Durch das langjährige Know-How kann BotCraft viele fertige Blaupausen für Schnittstellen und weitere Herausforderungen im Bereich Konnektivität anbieten. Zudem umfasst das Portfolio integrierte Produkte wie eine hochflexible und rekonfigurierbare Connectivity-Plattform (IIoT) und eine RPA-Lösung für industrielle Prozesse (iRPA) zur Testautomatisierung am HIL oder für die Überwachung von Produktionsprozessen. Daneben bietet BotCraft Predictive-Maintenance Lösungen basierend auf Vibrationssensorik (AIoT), ein Assistenzsystem das bei der Roboterprogrammierung die Achsenpositionierung hinsichtlich Energieverbrauch und Ausführgeschwindigkeit optimiert sowie eine RobotMES-Lösung für eine intelligente autonome Produktion. | BotCraft develops IIoT software bots, connectivity tools, and RPA solutions for industrial automation and Industry 4.0 use cases. | BotCraft develops software for Industry 4.0, focusing on industrial IoT, connectivity, and robotics. The company offers configurable software bots that link OT and IT, connect machines and sensors to cloud platforms, and enable data-driven services such as predictive maintenance and quality. Its products include IIoT connectors, workflow automation and RPA tools, and AI-based analytics components that run on edge, fog, or server environments. BotCraft also provides consulting and development services in embedded systems, IoT, robotics, and DevSecOps to help customers extend products, digitize production, and automate processes.

allResults.name: Compar Vision Systems & Robotics Ireland
allResults.description:
Compar Vision Systems and Robotics Ireland – a subsidiary of the Swiss company Compar AG, we are a solution provider and Integrator for Industrial Image Processing and Robotics.
Wherever quality control is required, zero-defect strategies pursued, resource efficiency and high productivity is demanded, industrial image processing systems from Compar (founded in 1986) can be found.
We offer holistic solutions using intelligent cameras, PC-based vision systems, precision robots, to complete testing systems with highly flexible handling.
Core tasks include inspections in 2D and 3D, print inspection, surface inspections, object recognition as well as code readings and robot guidance.

allResults.name: Emergent Design
allResults.description:
Emergent Design has been engineering, installing, and maintaining specialised industrial machine vision Quality Assurance systems for the manufacturing industry since 2011. Our passion lies in tackling technical challenges that others deem impossible and finding innovative solutions that redefine industry standards.

Devising new ways to solve hard problems is fun and we thrive on the exhilaration of designing intuitive, elegant user experiences that transform solutions into products. Our team is dedicated to developing and installing cutting-edge solutions that leverage image processing and machine learning to successfully tackle challenging technical problems in production monitoring and quality control. For over a decade, we’ve been raising standards and streamlining operations in manufacturing plants across Europe.

We write the specialist software required to operate these systems in-house, with a particular focus on image processing and modern UI design, developing on and designing for an open-source Linux-based stack. Our bespoke systems operate 24/7, analysing the shape, size, thermal, and visible properties of products on moving lines without interrupting the production process.

At Emergent Design, we don’t believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Unlike traditional software companies, we collaborate closely with mechanical and electronic design partners, as well as our on-site service engineers. Every system we design is tailored to meet the unique requirements of our clients, crafted to ensure seamless integration with your manufacturing process. || Emergent Design has been engineering, installing, and maintaining specialised industrial machine vision Quality Assurance systems for the manufacturing industry since 2011. In this way, we are able to produce autonomously the major part of the mechanical parts of our machines, reducing the delivery times and guaranteeing high flexibility. For what concerns the electrical installation,we employ the best components available on the market. 

For what concerns mechanics, electronics and applied technologies, our team of designer engineers can elaborate original, simple but functional solutions for satisfying Customers'​ requirements and solving the specific problems in the process of special cable production.

The devotion to research and design, material selection, accurate manufacturing, assembly and testing, allows WTM machines to meet fully the requirements of the most important cable producers all over the world.
The cables realized with WTM equipment comply with the strictest international rules, thanks to the high precision and flexibility of its machines, achieved with the big experience obtained through the development of hundreds of different applications. 

Our commitment for the future lies in continuously improving the technology of our machines, integrating more and more the resistant mechanical structure with the most sophisticated and innovative electronic and information elements.

allResults.name: Sull Systems
allResults.description:
At Sull Systems, machine safety is at the core of everything we do. We specialise in PLC automation, functional safety, and process control, ensuring compliance with international safety standards while optimising efficiency. Our expertise spans PLC programming, SCADA integration, electrical design, and robotics, delivering scalable automation solutions for manufacturing, FMCG, and process industries.

Expert Automation & Safety Solutions
With team members in Peterborough and Manchester, we provide UK-wide automation services. Our flexible, distributed approach ensures responsive support and expert solutions.

We handle all automation and safety services in-house, from safety PLC programming and machine guarding to SCADA development, batch control, and electrical design. Our engineers create precision safety circuits using E-Plan & CAD, while our robotics division ensures risk-assessed deployment.

Automation & Safety Support
We offer custom support services for fault diagnosis, PLC troubleshooting, and system maintenance. Our team provides technical expertise and remote assistance, keeping systems safe, compliant, and operational.

Industry Expertise

allResults.name: INNOVATEST UK
allResults.description:
INNOVATEST UK connects customers across the United Kingdom and Ireland with INNOVATEST products and services.

INNOVATEST is a global leading provider of hardness testing instruments. With its foundation laying in the 19th century, the company has a large history on producing and selling industrial products. For the last 25 years, the company has largely invested in the field of materials testing instruments. 

Complementary to the hardness testing range we offer optical measuring equipment and portable testing instruments such as surface roughness, wall thickness, vibration and other types of instruments used in the process of quality and production control. Our products are used all around the globe by manufacturers of key metal and plastic components, in particular the aircraft and automobile industry.

INNOVATEST develops & manufactures hardness testing instruments, accessories, hardness testing related machine vision systems and tester automation.
The company further supplies a range of optical inspection equipment and portable testing instruments. A reliable range of products, -fit to any budget- offering both traditional and state-of-the-art technology. || INNOVATEST UK connects customers across the United Kingdom and Ireland with INNOVATEST products and services.

Robustech provides 3D optical measurement equipment, quality inspection services, and automation solutions for industrial customers. The company acts as a trading and consulting partner, distributing brands such as Scantech, GapGun and Vectro, and offering project consultation and implementation support. Lucid Imaging Private Limited, headquartered in Bangalore with a development center in Coimbatore's SEZ, is a leader in advanced machine vision technology. With over 19 years of proven installations, Lucid Imaging develops and supplies a broad range of inspection systems for the print and paper industries, including solutions for paper inspection, online sheet inspection, number and web inspection, carton and label defect detection, serial number scanning, productivity tracking, 3D inspection, and soil note detection. The company is widely accepted in high-security print, commercial print, surface inspection, and sorting markets and collaborates with prominent OEMs to deliver reliable, high-quality solutions to clients in India and abroad. Lucid Imaging is also known for upgrading existing inspection systems and replacing components, offering clients access to the latest machine vision technologies. Its Components division partners with globally recognized brands such as IDS, Allied Vision, Opto Engineering, LIPS, Gardasoft, MVTec, Teledyne Dalsa, and Tamron to provide cameras, optics, software, lighting solutions, and frame grabbers for various industrial applications. allResults.name: Waygate Technologies
allResults.description: Waygate Technologies provides industrial inspection and non-destructive testing solutions for quality control and asset evaluation. The company develops systems for radiography and computed tomography, enabling internal visualization and dimensional analysis of components without physical alteration. Its portfolio includes remote visual inspection tools, ultrasound and eddy current devices, as well as hardness testing equipment used to detect defects and monitor material conditions. Waygate Technologies also integrates software and data analytics to support inspection workflows, automate analysis, and generate actionable insights from imaging and measurement data. allResults.name: Wilson Process Systems
allResults.description:
Wilson Process Systems is a commercial and industrial electronics equipment supplier. They provide PCB assembly, component procurement, environmental protection, electro-mechanical assembly, testing, and inspection. They also provide optical inspection and selective soldering equipment. || WPS offers specialist PCB assembly, providing agile, responsive manufacturing services, that supports customers across the country.

Backed by over 40 years'​ experience, the company currently employs approximately 75 personnel and specializes in sub-contract printed circuit board assembly. We deliver anything from bare PCBs to fully tested, electro-mechanical assemblies from our 30,000ft2 production facilities and supply a range of industries. These include consumer, industrial, entertainment, medical, rail, defence, highway and urban signage, lighting and power generation. 

2016 was a record year for the company, with growth of 28 per cent, taking annual turnover to in excess of £12 million. A key policy of continual investment in new equipment helps us keep pace with customer demand and maintain competitiveness. This has seen further additions to the plant in 2016, with additional optical inspection and selective soldering equipment, as well as increased surface mount capacity. 

The latest addition to Wilson's equipment inventory is a Synchrodex Orissa 460 high-speed, flexible, in-line, modular selective soldering system configured with a drop-jet fluxer module and an infra-red pre-heat and soldering module. This greatly increases the repeatability and quality of the conventional soldering process through automation, while also maintaining competitive production costs. 

In total, the surface mount department has a capacity of over 300,000 component placements per hour with two Universal AdVantis AC 30 Lightning high-speed chip placement platforms, a Universal AdVantis AC 72, a Quad QSA-30 and a Quad QSP-2 pick and place machine, together with reflow ovens form Soltec, BTU and Speedline Electrovert. The company claims a position as the first UK contract electronics manufacturer to offer automated assembly of PCBs up to 1,200 by 500mm, including the vital solder paste printing process. | Wilson Process Systems provides and assembles contract electronics boards. | Wilson Process Systems is a commercial and industrial electronics equipment supplier. They provide PCB assembly, component procurement, environmental protection, electro-mechanical assembly, testing, and inspection. They also provide optical inspection and selective soldering equipment. | PCB assemblies sub-contract manufrs

The true key challenge is that people and organizations struggle to take full advantage of the opportunities that arise with emerging technologies. As the gap increases, organization miss out on the opportunities of  letting their people engage in challenging tasks gives them a purpose in what they do. 

In Avo, we believe that we want to see a future where lots of new opportunities are created. Where technology helps us remove the mundane, boring tasks from our lives. In sum, a future where we create organizations that are more human, and where people enjoy showing up to work. 

That is what we are trying to build through our work together with clients: Help organizations close the technology gap so that people can be happier and more human.  

We offer services to the Nordic markets from our offices in Oslo and Bergen. | About We are not merely a consultancy, nor are we just a technology company. Nuestro éxito

1. Servicio técnico de alta capacidad y demostrada experiencia

A wealth of value added services also covers full Turnkey supply including full Procurement and conventional PCB assembly which complements the SMT for mixed technology PCB’s, plus full wiring and mechanical assembly. Skilcom’s reputation for its Inspection and Test facilities. This has all but eliminated 90% of human visual inspection which has vastly improved throughput enabling Skilcom to ship on average between 15,000 and 20,000 assembled PCB’s per month. allResults.name: Delta XD
allResults.description:
3D Metrology
With systems providing unmatched accuracy and traceability in the hands of engineers with more that 20 years combined metrology experience, Delta XD deliver onsite metrology services that prioritise precision and efficiency, right first time.

CAD Design
Delta XD has a wide range of design services with a particular expertise in reverse engineering scan data to design-intent models, whether for  legacy component remanufacture, retrofit interfacing or downstream analysis.  All models are meticulously rebuilt using high-quality 3D data, undergoing continuous  scan-to-CAD inspection verification to ensure accuracy and reliability. 

Inspection
Delta XD offers a range of inspection services, including single component inspections, batch analyses, fixture calibrations, FAIR and LAIR . With a wealth of experience in both manufacturing and metrology, our team's inspection capabilities range from detailed GD&T application to automated defect detection. 

Automation
Optimising automated scanning solutions can dramatically improve data quality and machine utilisation through increased throughput. Our experienced team can provide turnkey inspection solutions from scan-specific fixture design, data capture programming, inbuilt inspection with automated component sentencing. || 3D Metrology

allResults.name: LinkAI Technologies
allResults.description:
As an STO-based deep tech, we develop B2B data-centric, cost-effective, privacy-preserving and bespoke edge AI-powered visual inspection solutions to critical components defect/damage detection. Our solutions are highly accurate (96%+ accuracy when detecting highly complicated defect/damage patterns), cost-effective (70%+ cost saving) and secure (no source data but LinkAI’s in-house AI models), to help our customers effectivise and optimize manufacturing, quality control and maintenance processes, maximize yields and obtain the support and augmentation for the factory floor staff. Unlike the status quo, our in-house data-centric AI systems only require a very small number of defect datasets (e.g. ~10 samples) and guarantee in the entire process, no sensitive information will be touched, sent and leaked to any third party. 

We have now one aviation user, and we are engaging more from the electronics manufacturing, semiconductor foundry and battery sectors. Currently, our top-line offerings are three-folded:
1. Privacy-preserving and bespoke edge AI-driven visual inspection solutions for better and more sustainable quality control, maintenance and,
2. A proprietary light-weight edge solution to continuous self-improvement AI systems without using big & sensitive source data and,
3. An in-house data-centric data collection toolkit for data acquisition, data labeling and data improvement.

Welcome to follow us on LinkedIn and Instagram as well as reach out to us via info@linkaitech.eu for a demo. Stay relevant for a next trillion-dollar industry! 

In addition to be part of our challenging yet exciting projects, we also have the following perks, i.e.
1. Awards & bonuses	
2. Welcome lunch/pizza
3. Free fruits every week, and in the current pandemic, let’s stay fruity, healthy and safe!
4. Monthly AW pizza/dinner
5. Work from home allowed since we trust each other
6. Flexible working hours.

TriVision offers the customers a variety of quality control & quality assurance products such as the TriVision Packaging Inspector and the TriVision Product Inspector. | TriVision offers leading machine vision technology to automate inspection processes in the food and pharma industries. Our user-friendly systems inspect both products and packaging in production plants worldwide, and we are one of the only companies offering turnkey solutions capable of inspecting both seals and labels on packaging. TriVision’s solutions provide a solid business case in many ways: 

• User-friendly systems: You might need a PhD to develop our systems, but you don't need one to use them. Our intuitive systems are designed to be user-friendly for operators, enabling them to easily get an overview of production performance, adjust tolerances for quality levels, make changeovers, and fully examine the errors in defective products. 

• Production Intelligence: TriVision solutions take manufacturing to the next level by intelligently generating, crunching, and utilizing data enabling operators and site managers to gain valuable production insights. TriVision's platform lists a complete event log for each vision system showing all incidents, warnings, and alarms on the production line.

• Leading industry knowledge: TriVision has over 20 years of experience with automating inspection processes. Our solutions are designed to make a real impact in food- and pharma productions, by ensuring compliance and safety, reducing QC and failure costs, minimizing waste and downtime, and facilitating production optimization. 

Overall, TriVision aims to support the food and pharma industries in optimizing and delivering safe, high-quality products while minimizing waste and environmental impact.

allResults.description:
Aiso Oy is an AI and software consultancy that offers software development, architecture, and project management services for business-critical systems. The company designs and implements web, cloud, embedded, and desktop solutions, and builds integrations between financial, industrial automation, and fintech systems. Aiso Oy also delivers AI and machine learning based solutions, such as invoice digitization using computer vision and OCR. Its consultants support customers with DevOps practices, continuous integration and deployment, and modern software architecture design. || We know that there is a lot of wasted potential and lost value in businesses'​ IT-environments and ways of working.

We have seen how poorly configured environments cause errors and incorrect data. Testing and production environments might not be separated, hence, production is used for testing, changes in the test environment might break production and employees are afraid to use the test environment because it could impact production.

We have seen how two month projects are still going on after three years. Outcomes of the projects do not answer the actual needs and root causes of the problems are not treated at all. In addition, often following the chosen project model is more important than the outcome of the project.

We have seen how employees are working with demeaning automatable tasks and wasting their potential. Businesses might even lose customers or potential employees because the tools used are made nearly impossible to use.

We at Aiso are determined to change this situation!

We want to help businesses easily build environments using continuous integration and continuous deployment. This approach reduces development lead times and keeps production data clean - as it should be. Furthermore, employees are free to run experiments In their test environment without a fear of breaking something.

We want to help businesses improve their project management so that projects are finished on time and bring maximum value. Our approach allows customers to see the overall picture of the project through visualization and transparency. We aim to reduce the batch sizes so the lead times to production are shorter and errors are minimal. We do not consider any project model as a silver bullet and the model should be chosen to best fit each project. Methods of working should never reduce the value created.

We want to help businesses with our experience in AI and software development to decrease manual labor and let employees to do work worthy of a human. | Aiso is an AI and software consulting company that provides system development, software architecture, and project management services. | Aiso Oy is an AI and software consultancy that offers software development, architecture, and project management services for business-critical systems. PGM was established in 1992 with the founding of Premier Sheet Metal, specialising in sheet metal work. Since then we have grown to become the market leader in the bespoke manufacturing of low series production panels, assemblies and prototypes spanning the international automotive, aeronautical, rail and defence industries. We now specialise in fabrication, tool manufacture, quality & inspection, CAD, sheet metal work, project management, press shop and laser.

Any Graphics Private Limited also creates point‑of‑purchase materials including posters, tent cards, danglers, brochures and publicity tapes to support retail promotion. The company operates through Enterprise software, Printhead solutions, and Printing solutions segments. It offers ready-to-use Digital Front End (DFE) designed for industrial applications; Meteor Inkjet products and services; electronics; software; and tools and services. The company provides Harlequin Core, a raster image processor (RIP) software that converts text and image data from various file formats; ScreenPro Core, a software that converts tone image data into ready-to-print halftone; Mako Core, a software that creates, rasterises, converts, analyses and optimizes different page description languages, and allows full control over colour, fonts, text, images, vector content and metadata; PACKZ, a PDF editor for packaging and label production. It also offers Harlequin Direct, a software that drives print data directly to printer electronics; SmartDFE, a turnkey digital front end based on Harlequin Direct, CLOUDFLOW, and Meteor for digital printing of labels and packaging; Navigator Harlequin RIP and Workflow, a software that offers prepress environments to interpretation of PostScript, PDF, and EPS format files; Colour management software, a colour matching software; Navigator DFE, a software to prepare jobs, manage colour, and control digital output devices; and Output Device Interfaces, a hardware and software solutions to connect RIPs to computer-to-plate devices, imagesetters, proofers, digital presses, high-speed copiers, and inkjet printers. The company was formerly known as Global Graphics PLC and changed its name to Hybrid Software Group PLC in October 2021. The company offers NDT inspections such as ultrasonic, magnetic particle, liquid penetrant, radiographic, and visual testing. Its teams support installation and manufacturing supervision for projects in Finland and internationally across multiple industries. || Qualitas NDT Oy provides non-destructive testing, quality control, and inspection services for industrial and manufacturing customers. | Qualitas NDT Oy provides non-destructive testing and quality control services for industrial and manufacturing companies. The company offers NDT inspections such as ultrasonic, magnetic particle, liquid penetrant, radiographic, and visual testing. It delivers method and pre-production testing of welded joints for steel structures and pressurized equipment. Qualitas NDT Oy operates as an accredited inspection and certification body under FINAS. Its teams support installation and manufacturing supervision for projects in Finland and internationally across multiple industries. | Qualitas – Your Trusted Partner in Quality 

Qualitas NDT Oy is a strongly growing professional Finnish provider of quality control (QC) and non-destructive testing (NDT) services. Established in 2003, we have built a strong and growing expert organization that serves a diverse range of industries, both locally in Finland and globally. Our commitment to excellence and reliability has earned us the trust of clients in various sectors, from engineering and manufacturing to installation supervision.

At Qualitas NDT, we deliver top-tier services to engineering sites across Finland and extend our reach to international projects in countries such as China, Brazil, Malaysia, Turkey, and throughout the Baltic and Nordic regions. Our global experience, combined with local expertise, allows us to meet the highest standards of quality management and compliance, ensuring successful outcomes for our clients worldwide.

We are proud to be accredited by FINAS, the Finnish accreditation service, which reinforces our commitment to industry standards and regulatory compliance. Our certifications include:

Accreditation code I031: SFS-EN ISO/IEC 17020:2012 (Type A) for NDT inspection methods: UT, MT, PT, VT, RT.

Accreditation code I058: SFS-EN ISO/IEC 17020:2012 (Type A) for method and pre-production tests of welded joints (PED 2014/68/EU). 

Accreditation code S065: Qualitas NDT Oy as a certification body that meets the requirements of SFS-EN ISO/IEC 17024:2012 (PED 2014/68/EU).

As an accredited professional company in quality management and inspection services, we are dedicated to delivering precision, safety, and efficiency across all our projects, helping our clients achieve their goals with confidence and peace of mind.

SFLOW provides AI agents and integration services that connect business systems and data sources to automated workflows and operational tasks. The company offers an operations AI platform that links ERPs, CRMs, databases, file systems, APIs, email, and other tools to conversational agents for querying, reporting, and alerts. Its software connects to large language models such as Claude, GPT, Llama, or local models, starting in read-only mode and extending to actions with customer-controlled permissions. SFLOW delivers implementations for use cases like supply chain intelligence, document processing, label generation, and automated reporting across industrial and enterprise environments. Businesses today face a double challenge: fragmented systems that slow down decision-making, and a growing wave of new regulations around AI, data, and cybersecurity.

We address both.

System integration & automation: We connect ERP, CRM, spreadsheets, and custom workflows into one intelligent layer, reducing manual effort and eliminating silos.

AI adoption: We enable companies to deploy AI where it creates measurable value, from process optimization to compliance monitoring. MCP (Model Context Protocol) is one of the tools we use, but always in service of business outcomes.

Compliance by design: With upcoming EU regulations like the AI Act, DSA, and GDPR enforcement, we ensure technology is not only efficient but also audit-ready and secure.

Our approach is pragmatic: start small, validate quickly, and scale what works. The result is faster adoption, lower integration costs, and technology that supports, not constrains, growth.

Its software connects to large language models such as Claude, GPT, Llama, or local models, starting in read-only mode and extending to actions with customer-controlled permissions. allResults.name: OptiDetect
allResults.description:
OptiDetect is a computer vision startup that enables fast deployment and easy scaling of defect detection, quality control, and production analytics.

We help manufacturers unlock the power of computer vision and visual language models without the usual complexity, long projects, or heavy upfront investment. Our edge-based solution is designed for real production environments - simple, secure, and ready to deliver value from day one.

OptiDetect operates on a single edge computing device, connected to one or up to four cameras. Each system comes with a pretrained computer vision model that only requires lightweight fine-tuning using the client’s on-site data. No large data migrations, no cloud dependency, and no lengthy development cycles - just practical AI that works where production happens.

Because everything runs locally, all visual data stays on the client’s premises and within the local network. This ensures maximum data security, low latency, and reliable operation even in demanding industrial environments.

Integration is straightforward. Through a robust API, OptiDetect seamlessly connects with existing ERP, MES, and analytics systems, turning visual insights into actionable production data.

Our business model is as simple as our technology:
• No CAPEX investment
• No complex infrastructure
• One device, one solution
• Subscription-based monthly fee

OptiDetect lowers the barrier to adopting industrial computer vision, enabling companies to transition from idea to impact quickly - improving quality, reducing waste, and gaining real-time visibility into their production processes. || OptiDetect is a computer vision startup that enables fast deployment and easy scaling of defect detection, quality control, and production analytics.

Based in St Ives Cambridgeshire UK, we provide contract electronics manufacturing services including surface mount (SMT), Conventional (PTH) and box-build. Our engineering teams also provide Design for Manufacturing (DFM) and Test Development expertise.

Our flexible and responsive approach has enabled us to become one of the leading contract electronics manufacturers in the UK.

Production:

Our facilities are configured to provide a truly flexible service. We have the abilityThis is particularly useful at the front-end of new projects when the problems are most complex. 

We offer:

•	Rapid prototyping and rework facilities, (including BGA replacement service)
•	New Product Introduction (NPI) supported by MES software
•	Integrated electronic work instructions for assembly 
•	Automatic surface mount assembly with on-the-fly component verification (0201, fine pitch placement , BGA, QFN, DFN capability) 
•	Automatic Optical  Inspection (AOI)
•	Manual through hole component assembly with flow and hand soldering 
•	Electro-mechanical Assembly 
•	Box-build and system integration 
•	Inspection to IPC 610 Class 3
•	ISO 9001:2015 / 14001:2015 / IIP (Investors in People) 
•	Test strategy development 

Product Development Support

Customer services include:

• Pre-quotation analysis of customer engineering documentation
• Design reviews and value engineering
• Fast-track prototyping assembly/debugging
• RoHS compliance audit
• Conversion of Bill of Materials for RoHS compliant manufacture

Materials Management

• Full or part procurement of materials or free-issue kits
• Component optimisation (availability, price, quality, lead-times)
• Management of component obsolescence
• Cost-reduction programmes and alternative component sourcing
• Sourcing and management of RoHS compliant materials

With a focus on the flexible manufacturing, Prism harnesses production and engineering resources to add value to your designs and help you create successful products. || Based in St Ives Cambridgeshire UK, we provide contract electronics manufacturing services including surface mount (SMT), Conventional (PTH) and box-build. allResults.name: IconPro
allResults.description:
IconPro is the technically leading provider of software solutions for predictive quality & predictive maintenance as well as process & energy optimization in production. IconPro software helps manufacturing companies of all sizes to achieve more efficient and sustainable processes and machines. Our customers produce more competitively with less costs and resource usage. Originating from the Machine Tool Laboratory of RWTH Aachen University, the largest institute for production research in Europe, we offer in-depth production expertise and software perfectly tailored to the real needs of the shopfloor. || IconPro is the technically leading provider of software solutions for predictive quality & predictive maintenance as well as process & energy optimization in production. IconPro software helps manufacturing companies of all sizes to achieve more efficient and sustainable processes and machines. Our customers produce more competitively with less costs and resource usage. Originating from the Machine Tool Laboratory of RWTH Aachen University, the largest institute for production research in Europe, we offer in-depth production expertise and software perfectly tailored to the real needs of the shopfloor. | IconPro provides industrial AI software, machine learning, and professional consulting solutions for manufacturing and production companies. | IconPro is the technically leading provider of software solutions for predictive quality & predictive maintenance as well as process & energy optimization in production.

IconPro software helps manufacturing companies of all sizes to achieve more efficient and sustainable processes and machines. Our customers produce more competitively with less costs and resource usage.

Originating from the Machine Tool Laboratory of RWTH Aachen University, the largest institute for production research in Europe, we offer in-depth production expertise and software perfectly tailored to the real needs of the shopfloor. | Having started off as a spin-off of the WZL at RWTH Aachen University, we are now a strongly growing start-up with close connections to industry and science. In practice, IconPro supports manufacturing companies in the digitization of their production. IconPro develops software for industrial application of artificial intelligence, - in individual projects and as software-as-a-service. IconPro focuses on the application areas “predictive maintenance” of production units, “cognitive quality control” providing AI-based decision support during inspections, and “AI-based process analysis” for statistical analysis and correlation of production data. IconPro offers various services to support and implement industrial AI projects, ranging from software development and consulting on the appropriate data structure to workshops and seminars.

allResults.name: Digital Design
allResults.description:
Who we are Digital Design Corporation is a design organization committed to providing best-in-class craftsman digital design services and products for various industries (military, medical, industrial, and automotive). We architect, design, and implement chips, associated boards and software, and the systems which encompass them. Experience DDC has expert knowledge in implementing SOCs, ASICs, FPGAs, PLDs, circuit boards, driver software, microcode, and embedded processors, etc., and in SOC/ASIC/FPGA/board design flows, EDA tools and in dealing with ASIC foundries and back end processes. With average experience being over 20 years, and over 12 years of operation, DDC is committed to the creation of high quality digital circuits, products, and software. Consulting DDC will bid whole projects, whole chips, whole boards, or will just be members of a project team. The team specializes in video image processing, communications (networking, telecom, cellular, satcom, etc.), DSP, audio, interfaces, etc., especially as they apply to digital implementations. Products DDC designs and develops custom electronic products in the fields of Audio Processing, Video/Image Processing, Telemetry, Solid State storage, Video and Data Recorders. allResults.name: HC Technical Consulting And Contracting Services
allResults.description: HC Technical is owned and run by Hannah Cox TMIET, ICORR Level 3, she incorporated HC Technical as a limited company in January 2014 as demand for both the contracting branch of our business and the consulting side had increased beyond the capabilities of her home office. Hannah is a level 3 ICorr certified industrial coatings inspector, she is a registered member of The Institution Of Engineering And Technology, SSPC and BSI, and has worked as an engineer with a specific interest in industrial and intumescent coatings for over twenty five years across a variety of industries including boat building, power production, petrochemical, mining and quarrying. We provide independent consulting, quality control / inspection services and certified training schemes to a broad range of clients. HC Technical are an approved and audited provider of the SSPC Train The Painter scheme (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Coating Supervisor). We provide assessment services for the ICorr coating inspectors training scheme via The Corrodere Academy and also provide the accreddited (ASFP, bre, CSCS) Thin Film Intumescent Coating Applicators course. Our comprehensive experience is instrumental in ensuring that the right solution is provided for each situation. We are passionate about providing high quality work to our clients, whether the project is a small concrete step repair or a large scale industrial coating project, we insist that each client receives the same level of care and attention to detail. || HC Technical is owned and run by Hannah Cox TMIET, ICORR Level 3, she incorporated HC Technical as a limited company in January 2014 as demand for both the contracting branch of our business and the consulting side had increased beyond the capabilities of her home office. allResults.name: Perceptor
allResults.description:
Perceptor AS delivers consulting in data science, machine learning, analytics, and software engineering. Services include discovery sessions, solution architecture, data platform design, model development, and MLOps implementation across common cloud environments. The company builds prototypes and production systems for computer vision, natural language processing, forecasting, and decision support, and provides training and code reviews to client teams. Engagement models span advisory, project execution, and team augmentation with a focus on knowledge transfer. Tooling typically includes Python, SQL, open-source frameworks, and modern data pipelines. || I Perceptor jobber vi med å hjelpe våre kunder til å vokse gjennom å ta gode beslutninger basert på reell og anvendbar forbruker- og kundeinnsikt. Vi er et uavhengig ”innsikteri” som forvandler tall og ord til handling som gir resultater.

Vi jobber med flere ledende virksomheter i Norge og Norden, og har bred erfaring fra både forbruker- og bedriftsmarkedet. Vi kombinerer effektive innsiktsprosesser med relevante og godt gjennomførte kvalitative og kvantitative analyser - sammen med strategisk og operativ kommersiell forretningsforståelse. Hos oss møter du erfarne rådgivere i kombinasjon med noen av de skarpeste analysehodene i bransjen.

Gjennom gode diskusjoner og relevante analyser skaper vi reell og anvendbar forbruker- og kundeinnsikt som kan sikre gode interne beslutninger og lønnsomme konkurransefortrinn; vi bygger bro mellom praktisk forretningsstrategi og tradisjonell markedsanalyse.

allResults.name: Railvision
allResults.description:
Rail Vision is an innovation driven company. From its early days, the company has grown to become a leader in the area of automated visual track inspection systems using camera and laser technologies to recognise track defects and make highly accurate measurements. Its systems have been used in the field for analysing thousands of miles of track per year on a variety of platforms operating up to full line speeds. Rail Vision provides end to end solutions for its systems including quality control for all data analysis to provide its customers with the data that can be used directly for maintenance planning. Its efforts are focussed on delivering reliable, robust and provide cost-effective information which is not possible through other modes of inspection and is too expensive or impossible to get with manual track walking. The systems offered by Rail Vision reduce operator costs by performing inspection at line speeds requiring less possession time to make measurements and detect track faults. The output is objective and easy to audit over time. Rail Vision has worked closely with leading international rail companies on providing seamless end-to-end systems. It has developed systems for mainline railways, underground and tramways demonstrating the breadth of technology application across continents including Americas, Europe and Asia.

Rail Vision specialises in developing advanced image analysis and information management solutions for the rail industry. We deploy hardware and software systems for rail infrastructure monitoring. _________________________________

- Undertake the research and suggest modifications to existing programs which can create production efficiencies and improve the established machining techniques in terms of energy use and material handling. The research also includes advises on environmental control and different processes

The platform enables industrial scanners, smartphones, tablets and other computer interfaces to reliably, efficiently and economically identify traditional barcoded items, along with many other media objects. Digimarc Barcodes are imperceptible to people and do all that visible barcodes do, but perform better. They can be applied to virtually all forms of media. These remarkable capabilities have allowed Digimarc and its business partners to supply a wide range of patented consumer engagement, media management and security solutions across multiple consumer and government industry sectors. OUR VISION All of Digimarc’s solutions reflect a unified vision: to enrich everyday living via pervasive, intuitive computing. We accomplish this by creating a new means of communication ‒ based on digital watermarking technology ‒ that can be embedded into media and objects, allowing computers and digital devices to see, hear and engage with the world around them much like people do. The result is that consumers and organizations can easily access digital content when, where and how they want it.  There are tens of billions of digitally watermarked objects already in use today, and hundreds of millions of devices that can detect them and respond — but that’s just the beginning. Digimarc is partnering with industry leaders worldwide to make intuitive computing a reality by bringing convenience, simplicity and enhanced experiences to users’ interactions with media and the physical world.  DIGIMARC TECHNOLOGY AT WORK Digimarc and its partners offer a wide range of applications available today:  Link from print-to-web and instantly access relevant information or content online from a handheld digital device, like your mobile phone. Authenticate content and objects to confirm they are genuine, unaltered and from an authorized source. Monitor broadcasts and Internet distribution of television programming in geographical markets or over the Internet for market research and rights management. allResults.name: Cortus
allResults.description:
Cortus (a founding platinum member of the RISC-V Foundation) works with its customers to provide intelligent processing and system-on-chip solutions according to their requirements. We draw on a wide range of in-house IPs including analog circuits as well as both RISC-V and proprietary ISA 32 and 64-bit processors, system-level IP, interconnect IP, coherent caches, compilers, RTOSes, and embedded software which we use to provide complete HW, SW and system level solutions which give our customers significative competitive advantages in all kinds of an application domain from Bank Cards to Automotive SoCs (sensor interfaces, image processing, etc) to Space (Rad Hard for satellites). If you need something different to make you better than your competitors, then talk to us. We may well be able to come up with exactly what you need. We also have developed complete SoCs for different customers including one for IoT. This particular solution includes a medium-range RF transceiver along with a powerful microcontroller, AES in hardware, as well as a large embedded flash memory. Everything is needed for a secure, low-cost, low-power (up to 10 years battery life from a button cell) solution suitable for a wide range of IoT applications in smart buildings including ESL in supermarkets and car parks. Cortus IPs have been used in more than 6 billion devices. || Cortus is a fabless semiconductor manufacturer group headquartered in Mauguio (near Montpellier, France) with subsidiaries in Italy, Greece and Spain.

Cortus designs IC devices from simple MCUs to high-end SoCs drawing on its broad IP portfolio which includes processors 32/64-bit (Cortus ISA and RISC-V ISA), digital, analog, mixed-signal, RF and security IPs.

Cortus own IP portfolio addresses applications such as Automotive, Consumer, IoT/NB-IoT, Edge Computing and Industrial control.

Over 13 billion devices have been manufactured using Cortus know-how.

Cortus is a core contributing member and board member of the DASH7 Alliance. Cortus is also a member of the Wi-SUN alliance. Cortus is a Platinum Founding Member of the RISC-V Foundation and strategic member of RISC-V International.
Cortus is a Founding Platinum Member of the RISC-V Foundation. | Cortus is a manufacturing firm that designs IC devices from simple MCUs to high-end SoCs drawing on its broad IP. | Cortus (a founding platinum member of the RISC-V Foundation) works with its customers to provide intelligent processing and system-on-chip solutions according to their requirements. The Company designs and offers microcontrollers, microprocessors, and system-on-chips for industrial, automotive, consumer, robotics, AI inference for computer vision, and avionics applications. Cortus serves customers in France. | About Cortus SAS is a French semiconductor and IP embedded systems design company headquartered in Mauguio (near Montpellier), France. Cortus is a Founding Platinum member of the RISC-V Foundation. Cortus SAS is a French semiconductor and IP embedded systems design company headquartered in Mauguio (near Montpellier), France. Cortus focuses on providing ... full advanced processing embedded systems solutions including a wide range of different processor IPs. Cortus is a Founding Platinum member of the RISC-V Foundation. Cortus has released three families of processors, 32 bit processors with mixed 16/32 bit long instructions, a family with 16/24/32 bit instructions featuring coherent caches, co-processors and other features for complex multi-core systems, as well as a range of RISC-V ISA processors. A specific feature of the processors from Cortus is their low silicon footprint and low power consumption. Cortus’ proprietary ISA exhibits exceptional code density significantly reducing the silicon cost of on chip non-volatile memories for embedded solutions. The difference which sets Cortus apart from other processor IP vendors is that we create complete solutions including customized multi-layer interconnect, peripherals, co-processors as well as RTOS ports, device drivers, protocol stacks and debugging solutions for our customers applications. So far over 50 companies have licensed Cortus cores and over 1.9 billion devices have been manufactured containing Cortus processor cores. Cortus is more than just IP provider. We provide the full support that you need to make your product a success. See More Founding Date Mr. Michael Chapman, Mr. Duc Nguyen Huu Awards Emergence Prize Awarded to Cortus by the French Ministry for Research on Innovating Technologies' Innovative and Development Business Prize Awarded to Cortus ... by the French Ministry for Research on Innovating Technologies' Award TPE, 6th Year Prizewinner of the 'Tremplin Entreprises' national contest award of the innovating companies See More Products Cortus has released three families of processors, 32 bit processors with mixed 16/32 bit long instructions, a family with 16/24/32 bit instructions featuring ... coherent caches, co-processors and other features for complex multi-core systems, as well as a range of RISC-V ISA processors. A specific feature of the processors from Cortus is their low silicon footprint and low power consumption. Cortus’ proprietary ISA exhibits exceptional code density significantly reducing the silicon cost of on chip non-volatile memories for embedded solutions. Cortus Advanced Processing Solutions (APS) and Floating Point Solutions (FPS) are all 32- bit RISC processor IP designed to efficiently execute instructions in higher level languages. Cortus processors feature the same instruction set architecture but differ in performance, power, and area. The APS family of processors are ideal for applications requiring performance/power efficiency with minimal area. Applications demanding more performance and floating point operations will find the FPS processors ideal. The Processors The APS3 core is a modern RISC processor with Harvard architecture. The instructions are 16 bits in length, with a 16 bit extension when needed (no mode switches necessary) giving excellent code density. The pipeline features out-of-order execution enabling nearly all instructions to execute in a single cycle, including loads and stores. Interrupts are fully vectored and the architecture ensures a minimum of software overhead in task switches. The processor was designed to execute high level languages, notably C, with ease. The software application can be entirely realised in C, interrupt routines included. The entire GNU GCC toolsuite has been ported to this architecture and is available free of charge. The family currently consists of the following members: APS1 a low cost and silicon area microprocessor APS3 the core member of the family APS3R nn improved performace version of the APS3 APS5 high performane integer processor FPS6 with tightly integrated floating point APS3V Compact Implementation of the RISC-V RV32IMC ISA The peripherals The advantage of a 32 bit processor is having enough address space to layout the peripheral registers in a way that makes programming for the peripherals easy and reduce the number of instructions to required to implement drivers. A wide range of peripherals are available: Simple Counter General Purpose I⁄O JTAG Timer Compare Unit (PWM) Capture Unit Simple Fixed Baud Rate UART Fractional Baud Rate UART SPI I2C Instruction Cache Data Cache Memory Management Unit Trace Buffer Peripheral Bridge Watchdog In addition to these simple peripherals, there are also peripherals with more sophisticated functionality: Instruction Cache Data Cache MMU Trace Buffer Feature rich interface peripherals are also available: Ethernet MAC (10/100) USB 2.0 MAC See More | Mail Order & Catalog Shopping | L'établissement est spécialisé dans le domaine de la conception, la fabrication et le conseil en système informatique. Edition de logiciel sur spécification du client. Conception de système pour les outils tactiles. Intégrateur de silicium pour les processeurs informatiques.

allResults.name: ROBAT
allResults.description:
RoBAT designs and manufactures specialised automatic test equipment for the printed circuit board industry. The company provides robotic test systems that combine electrical measurement, mechanical measurement, automatic optical inspection, and high speed signal integrity testing in a single platform. Its equipment is used for backplanes, daughtercards, linecards, and bare boards in both new product introduction and volume production environments. RoBAT offers fixtureless test solutions and time-domain reflectometry systems that support impedance, skew, backdrill and related measurements. Its products are used by contract electronics manufacturers and original equipment manufacturers that require automated, repeatable PCB testing solutions. || RoBAT is a privately owned technology company and leading supplier of specialized automatic test equipment. | RoBAT designs and manufactures automated PCB test equipment combining electrical, mechanical, optical, and high speed signal integrity tests | RoBAT designs and manufactures specialised automatic test equipment for the printed circuit board industry. The company provides robotic test systems that combine electrical measurement, mechanical measurement, automatic optical inspection, and high speed signal integrity testing in a single platform. Its equipment is used for backplanes, daughtercards, linecards, and bare boards in both new product introduction and volume production environments. RoBAT offers fixtureless test solutions and time-domain reflectometry systems that support impedance, skew, backdrill and related measurements. Its products are used by contract electronics manufacturers and original equipment manufacturers that require automated, repeatable PCB testing solutions. | RoBAT is the only company focusing exclusively on today’s complex backplanes

Worldwide  Sales & Support
For all enquiries email sales@robattest.com

To compete successfully in today's global marketplace, you need to apply the right expertise at the right time to every stage of your product’s life cycle. RoBAT’s core competency in test program generation and application services can help you at critical phases of your product verification and test strategy, and shorten your time to market.

Our Products
•	RoBAT S1 - Fixtureless Test including AOI
•	RoBAT RCI - Signal Integrity, TDR, S-parameter
•	RoBAT RXI - X-Ray including AOI
•	RoBAT PDM - Pin Depth Measurement and AOI 
•	RoBAT BICT50K Fixtured Test including ICT


Support
A dedicated, worldwide team of customer service and support engineers stand behind all RoBAT offerings:

•	Onsite installation and check-out 
•	Remote operation/monitoring of our machines over the web
•	24 hour Telephone support 
•	On site hardware support
•	Applications phone support for both hardware and software 
•	Regular system status reports 
•	Replacement parts stocked in US, Europe, and Asia 
•	Customer support bulletins 
•	Maintenance agreements 
•	Training classes include test program development, hardware maintenance, operator training 
•	Onsite applications assistance 
•	Consulting | ROBAT LIMITED is a machinery company based out of UNIT 2 SNAPE ROAD, MACCLESFIELD, United Kingdom. | Electronic equipment assemblers & manufrs

allResults.name: Cgrain
allResults.description:
Cgrain AB develops and manufactures analytical instruments for visual quality control of cereals with image analysis.   Cgrains CEO Jaan Luup has previously developed the Seed Scanner and also owns the company Maxx Automation AB. Seed Scanner is an instrument that uses image analysis in seed testing to quantify foreign seeds and have been sold to several seed testing laboratories in Europe.   In 2009, Lantmännen and Jaan Luup started a research project to devolop the use of image analysis in the grain and milling industries. Lantmännen is an agricultural cooperative rooted in Swedish farming and owned by about 29,000 farmers around the country.   The project resulted in the company Cgrain AB that was founded in 2013. Cgrain AB is owned 70% by CEO Jaan Luup and 30% of Lantmännen and run entirely independent of Lantmännen's other businesses. Product development and manufacturing is located in Uppsala in the middle of Sweden. || Cgrain Value ™ simplifies the work of the visual quality assessment of grain. | Cgrain AB develops and manufactures analytical instruments for visual quality control of cereals with image analysis.   Cgrains CEO Jaan Luup has previously developed the Seed Scanner and also owns the company Maxx Automation AB. In 2009, Lantmännen and Jaan Luup started a research project to devolop the use of image analysis in the grain and milling industries. Lantmännen is an agricultural cooperative rooted in Swedish farming and owned by about 29,000 farmers around the country.   The project resulted in the company Cgrain AB that was founded in 2013. Cgrain AB is owned 70% by CEO Jaan Luup and 30% of Lantmännen and run entirely independent of Lantmännen's other businesses. Product development and manufacturing is located in Uppsala in the middle of Sweden. | We increase quality and yield in the food value chain by supplying objective and reliable visual inspection of grain.

Our business idea is to develop, produce and sell solutions for automated visual inspection of grain, including software, hardware, service, and implements to customers in the food value chain on a global market.

We are based in Uppsala, Sweden, and have distributors in all our key markets around the globe. | Cgrain AB develop and produce instruments for visual grain quality control. By using advanced image analyzing technique our instruments can determine quality defects such as broken kernels, foreign seeds, ergot, wild oats, burnt or green kernels etc. We provide our costumers with a modern and objective method for controling the quality of unprocessed cereals which are labor efficient, easy to use and precise. Our instrument, Cgrain Value, are developed for analyzing whear, rye, barley, oats and peeled oats. 

Cgrain AB is based in Uppsala, Sweden. The company is owned to 70 % by the founder Jaan Luup and to 30 % by the Swedish Lantmännen AB.

Leaders know AI will reshape their business.

Misaligned AI strategy

Every initiative is tied to clear business metrics-cost reduction, revenue growth, efficiency gains, or risk mitigation.
We commit to a minimum 3:1 ROI.

We act as long-term transformation partners, staying engaged from strategy through production and beyond.

Enterprises looking to move AI from pilots to scalable production

Our comprehensive services include CFD Smoke and Evacuation Analysis, Car Park and Tunnel ventilation, Documentation / MDB and Inspection Document Evaluation, ensuring optimised performance, safety, and efficiency in every project. 

Our Services
We provide a wide range of engineering solutions bringing expert technical analysis, planning, quality control, inspection and consultancy skills to optimise our clients' engineering projects and improve business performance  including: 

Engineering Consultancy
With senior expertise spanning Preliminary, Basic, and Detailed Engineering, our international team delivers a comprehensive suite of engineering and consultancy services. Through our interconnected service offerings and modular methodology, we are able to support a wide variety of projects, providing tailored solutions that precisely address the unique requirements of each client.

CFD Analysis 
We deliver advanced computational fluid dynamics (CFD) services in full compliance with ANSI/ASHRAE and applicable local standards, including British (BS EN 7346-7) and Middle East/UAE codes. Leveraging state-of-the-art numerical modeling and technical analysis, our simulations are rigorously benchmarked against experimental data and in-service testing, ensuring high accuracy, reliability, and confidence in results. Our methodologies are fully customised to meet specific client and project requirements, supporting a wide range of systems including residential complexes and car park ventilation networks.

Documentation & MDB

핵심 기술은 SLAM, 디지털트윈, AI 자율주행이며, 이를 기반으로 물류, 건설, 안전, 재난 대응 산업에 최적화된 플랫폼을 제공합니다. 물류 현장에서는 자율주행 로봇으로 안전성과 효율성을 높이고, 건설 현장에서는 디지털트윈 기반 로봇 기술로 공정 관리와 품질 검증을 혁신하며, 재난 대응에서는 사족보행 로봇이 위험 지역에 진입해 탐색과 구조를 수행합니다.

모빌리오는 글로벌 기업과 협력하며 성과를 창출하고 있습니다. 현대자동차와의 사족보행 로봇 협력, 한진 물류 안전 브레이크 시스템, HD현대의 자율주행 지게차, SK에코플랜트 디지털트윈 프로젝트 수상, 코닝의 물류 감시 로봇, 삼성중공업 속도 감지 로봇 등이 대표적입니다. 또한 태국, 베트남, 인도네시아, 사우디, 미국 텍사스 등 글로벌 현장에서 로보큐(RoboQ)를 운영 중입니다.

우리는 “로봇 기술로 세상을 더 안전하고 효율적으로”라는 비전을 가지고 연구개발과 파트너십을 확대하며, 글로벌 로봇 시장을 선도해 나가고 있습니다.

allResults.name: Sheen Instruments
allResults.description:
Sheen Instruments is a leading manufacturer and supplier of quality inspection and testing instruments used in the paint, coating, automotive and other industries.

Formed in 1947, we are an internationally recognised brand in the industry with a worldwide customer base. Having started as a UK-based manufacturing company, the business has expanded hugely into international markets working closely with our distributors in over 40 countries. Our service network is being developed to provide servicing for our products.

We offer a comprehensive product range in the field of appearance inspection, physical testing and viscosity measurement.

Our appearance inspection instruments make sure that our customers meet their quality standards in colour, gloss, finish effect and other visual parameters of paints, coatings and surface-finished materials.

For physical testing, we provide reliable equipment that tests various physical properties of paint and coatings, such as durability against abrasion, or adhesiveness of the material, among others.

In the viscosity field, we offer range of instruments to precisely measure viscosity of different materials, which is one of the key parameters in our customer’s quality control and product characterization process.

As a part of Elektron Technology Group headquartered in Cambridge, UK, Sheen continues to provide high-quality products with excellent reliability; ensuring our customers can meet today’s challenging demands. || Sheen Instruments is a leading manufacturer and supplier of quality inspection and testing instruments used in the paint, coating, automotive and other industries.
